objections.objection_text: Fear that following God means losing earthly happiness (marriage, sex, success).
objections.underlying_belief: God's path is a path of deprivation rather than abundance.
objections.underlying_fear: Being forced into celibacy or monk life.
objections.counter_truth_angle: If you open yourself to the 'worst case' (monk life), God often floods you with the very things you were afraid to lose (abundance of women/opportunities).
objections.transcript_proof_quote_redacted: I was like, if you want me to be in religious life, I'm open to it. I'm going to stop having fear around that... And then as soon as I opened myself up to that, like, women, like, clockwork just started popping up.
